title: Mbombela, Mpumalanga — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mbombela, Mpumalanga: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mbombela is a city in Mpumalanga with a population of 110,000. The capital of Mpumalanga, a gateway to Kruger National Park with a subtropical climate and growing economy.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
